originalTitle: Trump will oppose heavy US AI regulation, says outgoing tech adviser
summary: Sriram Krishnan tells the FT the president is against a centralised regulator as AI backlash grows
content: Sriram Krishnan tells the FT the president is against a centralised regulator as AI backlash grows
chineseTitle: 即将离任的技术顾问表示，特朗普将反对美国对 AI 进行严格监管

whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
